verses.geez:
ወበሳብዕ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አመ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማሕረስ
                  ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ወዕለተ ፡ ትእምርት ፡ ትኩንክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And in the seventh month, on the first day of the month, there shall be to you a holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work: it shall be to you a day of blowing the trumpets.
translations.kjv: And in the seventh month, on the first day of the month, ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work: it is a day of blowing the trumpets unto you.

verses.geez:
ወትገብሩ ፡ መሣውዐ ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ሶረ ፡ አሐደ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዐ ፡ አሐደ ፡
                  ወማሕስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ ዘዘዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall offer whole-burnt-offerings for a sweet savour to the Lord, one calf of the herd, one ram, seven lambs of a year old without blemish.
translations.kjv: And ye shall offer a burnt offering for a sweet savour unto the LORD; one young bullock, one ram, and seven lambs of the first year without blemish:

verses.geez: ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ሠለስቱ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩ላህም ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩በግዕ ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offering shall be fine flour mingled with oil; three tenth deals for one calf, and two tenth deals for one ram:
translations.kjv: And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals for a bullock, and two tenth deals for a ram,

verses.geez: ወዓሥራ[ት] ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩ማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ለሰብዐቲሆሙ ፡ ማሕስአ ፡ አባግዕ ።

translations.lxx: a tenth deal for each several ram, for the seven lambs.
translations.kjv: And one tenth deal for one lamb, throughout the seven lambs:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ያስተሰርዩ ፡ ለክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you.
translations.kjv: And one kid of the goats for a sin offering, to make an atonement for you:

verses.geez:
ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕት ፡ ዘበበ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙኒ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙኒ ፡ [ወመሥዋዕትኒ ፡ ዘዘልፍ ፡
                  ወመሥዋዕቶሙኒ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙኒ ፡] ዘከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Beside the whole-burnt-offerings for the new moon, and their meat-offerings, and their drink-offerings, and their perpetual whole-burnt-offering; and their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings according to their ordinance for a sweet-smelling savour to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Beside the burnt offering of the month, and his meat offering, and the daily burnt offering, and his meat offering, and their drink offerings, according unto their manner, for a sweet savour, a sacrifice made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ለሠርቀ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ወአሕምምዋ ፡ ለነፍስክሙ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ግብረ
                  ፡ ማሕረስ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ።

translations.lxx: And on the tenth of this month there shall be to you a holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls, and ye shall do no work.
translations.kjv: And ye shall have on the tenth day of this seventh month an holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls: ye shall not do any work therein:

verses.geez:
ወታበውኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ሶረ ፡ አሐደ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወበግዐ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ወመሓስአ ፡
                  አባግዕ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ይኩንክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall bring near whole-burnt-offerings for a sweet-smelling savour to the Lord; burnt-sacrifices to the Lord, one calf of the herd, one ram, seven lambs of a year old; they shall be to you without blemish.
translations.kjv: But ye shall offer a burnt offering unto the LORD for a sweet savour; one young bullock, one ram, and seven lambs of the first year; they shall be unto you without blemish:

verses.geez: ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ (ወ)ሠለስቱ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩ላህም ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩በግዕ ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offering shall be fine flour mingled with oil; three tenth deals for one calf, and two tenth deals for one ram.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals to a bullock, and two tenth deals to one ram,

verses.geez: ወዓሥራ[ት] ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩ማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ለሰብዐቲሆሙ ፡ መሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ።

translations.lxx: A tenth deal for each several lamb, for the seven lambs.
translations.kjv: A several tenth deal for one lamb, throughout the seven lambs:

verses.geez:
ወሐርጌ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ያስተሰርዩ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ዘበእንተ
                  ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘአስተስርዮ ፡ ወመሥዋዕት ፡ ዘዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙኒ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙኒ ፡ በከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you; beside the sin-offering for atonement, and the continual whole-burnt-offering, its meat-offering, and its drink-offering according to its ordinance for a smell of sweet savour, a burnt-sacrifice to the Lord.
translations.kjv: One kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the sin offering of atonement, and the continual burnt offering, and the meat offering of it, and their drink offerings.

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወኀሙሱ ፡ ለሠርቀ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ሳብዕ ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማሕረስ
                  ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ወግበሩ ፡ በዓለ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ባቲ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ መዋዕለ ።

translations.lxx: And on the fifteenth day of this seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work; and ye shall keep it a feast to the Lord seven days.
translations.kjv: And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work, and ye shall keep a feast unto the LORD seven days:

verses.geez:
ወአብኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ቍርባን ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አመ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቀዳሚት ፡ አስዋረ ፡ ሠለስተ ፡
                  እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወዐሠርተ ፡ አልህምተ ፡ ወክልኤተ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ወዐሠርተ ፡ ወአርባዕተ ፡ መሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ዘዘ ፡
                  ዓመት ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ ይኩኑ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall bring near whole-burnt-offerings, a sacrifice for a smell of sweet savour to the Lord, on the first day thirteen calves of the herd, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old; they shall be without blemish.
translations.kjv: And ye shall offer a burnt offering, a sacrifice made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD; thirteen young bullocks, two rams, and fourteen lambs of the first year; they shall be without blemish:

verses.geez:
ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ሠለስቱ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለለ ፡ ላህም ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ለዐሠርቲሆሙ ፡
                  ወሠለስቲሆሙ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩በግዕ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ለክልኤሆሙ ፡ አባግዕ ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offerings shall be fine flour mingled with oil; there shall be three tenth deals for one calf, for the thirteen calves; and two tenth deals for one ram, for the two rams.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals unto every bullock of the thirteen bullocks, two tenth deals to each ram of the two rams,

verses.geez: ዐ[ሥራት] ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ለ፩ማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ለዐሠርቲሆሙ ፡ ወአርባዕቲሆሙ ፡ ማሕስአ ፡ አባግዕ ።

translations.lxx: A tenth deal for every lamb, for the fourteen lambs.
translations.kjv: And a several tenth deal to each lamb of the fourteen lambs:

verses.geez:
ወሐርጌ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the continual whole-burnt-offering: there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez: ወበሳ[ኒታ] ፡ ዕለት ፡ ፲ወ፪አስዋር ፡ ወ፪አባግዕ ፡ ወ፲ወ፬መሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ዘዘዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And on the second day twelve calves, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old without blemish.
translations.kjv: And on the second day ye shall offer twelve young bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without spot:

verses.geez: ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በኍለቊሆሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offering and their drink-offering shall be for the calves and the rams and the lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the perpetual whole-burnt-offering; their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and the meat offering thereof, and their drink offerings.

verses.geez: ወበሣልስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አስዋር ፡ ፲ወ፩ወበግዕ ፡ ፪ወመሐስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ፲ወ፬ንጹሓን ፡ ዘዘዓመት ።

translations.lxx: On the third day eleven calves, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old without blemish.
translations.kjv: And on the third day eleven bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish;

verses.geez: ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በበ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offering and their drink-offering shall be to the calves and to the rams and to the lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the continual whole-burnt-offering; there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez: ወበራብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አስዋር ፡ ፲ወ፪አባግዕ ፡ ወ፲ወ፬መሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: On the fourth day ten calves, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old without spot.
translations.kjv: And on the fourth day ten bullocks, two rams, and fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish:

verses.geez: ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በበ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ ።

translations.lxx: There shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings to the calves and the rams and the lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: Their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the continual whole-burnt-offering there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez: ወበኃምስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አስዋር ፡ ፱ወ፪አባግዕ ፡ ወ፲ወ፬መሐስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: On the fifth day nine calves, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old without spot.
translations.kjv: And on the fifth day nine bullocks, two rams, and fourteen lambs of the first year without spot:

verses.geez:
ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሐስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በከመ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings shall be to the calves and the rams and the lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the perpetual whole-burnt-offering; there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez: ወበሳድስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አስዋር ፡ ፰ወ፪አባግዕ ፡ ወ፲ወ፬መሐስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: On the sixth day eight calves, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old without blemish.
translations.kjv: And on the sixth day eight bullocks, two rams, and fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish:

verses.geez:
ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በበ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ወበከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: There shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings to the calves and rams and lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the perpetual whole-burnt-offering; there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez: ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ አልህምት ፡ ፯ወአባግዕ ፡ ፪ወ፲ወ፬መሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ንጹሓን ።

translations.lxx: On the seventh day seven calves, two rams, fourteen lambs of a year old without blemish.
translations.kjv: And on the seventh day seven bullocks, two rams, and fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish:

verses.geez:
ወመሥዋዕቶሙኒ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙኒ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሓስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በበ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ወበከመ ፡
                  ሕጎሙ ።

translations.lxx: Their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings shall be to the calves and the rams and the lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez: ወሐርጌ ፡ ፩እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the continual whole-burnt-offering; there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez: ወበሳምንት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ተሐውሶ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማሕረስ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ባቲ ።

translations.lxx: And on the eighth day there shall be to you a release: ye shall do no servile work in it.
translations.kjv: On the eighth day ye shall have a solemn assembly: ye shall do no servile work therein:

verses.geez:
ወአብኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ቍርባን ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ላህመ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ወበግዐ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ፡
                  ወመሖስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ ሰብዐተ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall offer whole-burnt-offerings as sacrifices to the Lord, one calf, one ram, seven lambs of a year old without spot.
translations.kjv: But ye shall offer a burnt offering, a sacrifice made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD: one bullock, one ram, seven lambs of the first year without blemish:

verses.geez:
ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ ፡ ለአልህምትኒ ፡ ወለአባግዕኒ ፡ ወለመሐስአ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ በበ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ወበከመ ፡ ሕጎሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: There shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings for the calf and the ram and the lambs according to their number, according to their ordinance.
translations.kjv: Their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullock, for the ram, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the manner:

verses.geez:
ወሐርጌ ፡ አሐደ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘልፍ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And one kid of the goats for a sin-offering; beside the continual whole-burnt-offering; there shall be their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings.
translations.kjv: And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, and his drink offering.

verses.geez:
ወከመዝ ፡ ግበሩ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በበዓላቲክሙ ፡ ወዘበፈቃድክሙኒ ፡ ወቍርባንክሙኒ ፡ ወመሥዋዕትክሙኒ ፡
                  ወሞጻሕትክሙኒ ፡ ወዘመድኀኒትክሙ ።

translations.lxx: These sacrifices shall ye offer to the Lord in your feasts, besides your vows; and ye shall offer your free-will-offerings and your whole-burnt-offerings, and your meat-offerings and your drink-offerings, and your peace-offerings.
translations.kjv: These things ye shall do unto the LORD in your set feasts, beside your vows, and your freewill offerings, for your burnt offerings, and for your meat offerings, and for your drink offerings, and for your peace offerings.
